content.en:
Knowing that the silver liquid substance could replicate and cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, and the effect was very good, Ye Tian began to use the silver liquid substance to assist in cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique.

With the help of the silver liquid substance, Ye Tian quickly cultivated the first layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the Consummation Realm, and then began to cultivate the second layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique.

With the progress of the second layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, Ye Tian's physical strength limit was constantly expanded.

Therefore, Ye Tian's physical strength could continue to increase, and it became stronger and stronger.

The Eighteen Golden Body Tricks and the Chaos Golden Desolation Tricks, the former is to directly increase the strength of the physical body, while the latter is to expand the limit of the physical body, and you can cultivate at the same time.

With these two exercises, coupled with Ye Tian's many resources, Ye Tian's physical strength can definitely reach an extremely exaggerated level, and his strength can far surpass that of the same level.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's attainments in the second layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique were getting higher and higher.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had cultivated for 10,000 years under the passage of time, and only a few decades had passed in the outside world.

At this time, Ye Tian had already successfully cultivated the second layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the consummation realm, and at the same time, the strength of his physical body had also been raised to the limit.

Now Ye Tian's physical strength has far surpassed before, and his strength has naturally improved a lot.

Meanwhile.

Under the super replication fusion ability, Ye Tian's god-level time talent and god-level space talent finally completed the fusion.

"Check!"

Ye Tian urged to copy the talent and checked the new talent.

【Space-Time Talent: God-level】

"It's still a god-level talent!"

Ye Tian originally thought that after his time talent and space talent were fused, he would become a talent that surpassed the god level.

Because according to records, the time talent and space talent are indeed at the level above the god level, but it is a pity that they are short-lived in the universe.

Although the space-time talent after the fusion of time talent and space talent still belonged to the god level, Ye Tian was soon very satisfied.

Because the space-time talent is much more powerful than the god-level time talent alone and the god-level space talent alone, the time power and space power have increased by at least five times.

In addition, the space-time talent is a fusion of time power and space power, so the space-time talent can fuse two forces to attack, and the power is naturally incredible.

And one of the attack methods directly born from the god-level space-time talent is-

"Chrono Blade!"

The power of the blade of time and space is terrifying, once activated, it directly freezes a piece of void and instantly hits the enemy's body, and the power of time and space bursts out, annihilating the enemy's body.

It can be said that the power of the blade of time and space has become a very terrifying means for Ye Tian, and it is difficult to break the boundary.

Once you face Ye Tian's blade of time and space, you can almost only resist hard, and if you can't bear it, you will die!

Coupled with the birth of the space-time talent, Ye Tian's control over the power of time and space has become more powerful and powerful.

This directly led to Ye Tian's Hell Divine Sky Spear and Time Blade being much more powerful, which was not comparable to before.

"My overall strength has instantly sublimated! Even if I am in the ranks of the Sons of the Era, I am definitely among the top!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Let's get out of the customs!"

Ye Tian lifted the time formation, put away the half-finished time origin artifact, and officially exited the customs.

After a few more days, Ye Tian came up with an idea, that is, to impact the Great God level.

He has now reached the limit that the True God level can reach, and there is no need to continue to improve, because he is already a True God-level Era Son, and he is definitely the top Era Son.

It's not so easy to continue to improve, it's better to hit the great god level and slowly accumulate the foundation at the great god level.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian came to a remote place in the Origin Realm and began to attack the Great God Level to welcome the arrival of the Thunder Tribulation.

As for the Lord of Darkness, he guards in the dark.

The difference between the Great God level and the True God level is also the difference between immortal power or divine power, as long as the immortal power is transformed, only the impact galaxy level is different.

Ye Tian ran the great god-level secret technique of the supreme hall of the human race, and let the immortal power begin to transform and impact the great god-level.

Soon, Ye Tian's immortal power began to transform into a great god-level immortal power.

Rumble!!!!

A trace of true god-level immortal power began to transform into great god-level immortal power, and although the total amount of immortal power was introduced many times, the quality was also increased many times.

At the same time, Ye Tian also took out a large number of Chaos Crystals, turning them into countless energies and pouring into Ye Tian's body to assist in this breakthrough.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's immortal power to be transformed, and the aura of the whole person also changed.

"I've successfully stepped into the god level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At the same time as stepping into the Great God level, Ye Tian's immortal soul was also correspondingly stronger, but the transformation was not obvious.

Thundered!!!!

Above the void, the clouds appeared.

The tribulation clouds covering millions of miles shrouded the void above Ye Tian's head, and the thunder tribulation would descend at any time.

"The god level is three thunder tribulations, and the true god level is six thunder tribulations, and now that I am impacting the great god level, I need to face nine thunder tribulations, and the power of each thunder tribulation is estimated to be enough to seriously injure a supreme-level highness! The attack power of the last thunder tribulation may be enough to kill an ordinary supreme-level highness!"

Ye Tian estimated.

However, he was now promoted by the Son of the True God-level Top Era, so he was naturally not afraid of this thunderstorm.

Soon, the first thunderstorm struck.

Rumble!!!!

The huge pillar of thunder tribulation bombarded it, and its power made the dark lord in the dark frightened.

"What a terrifying thunder tribulation, if it were other highnesses, it would definitely die!"

The darkness dominates the dark paths.

However, he also knew the strength of his Highness, and there was no danger in resisting such a thunderstorm.

I saw Ye Tian's heart move, and the Five Elements Divine Wheel appeared above his head and stopped the thunder tribulation.

The thunder tribulation bombarded the Five Elements Divine Wheel, but it failed to shatter the Five Elements Divine Wheel.

"It seems that after my strength has improved, the power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel has also increased a lot, in other words, even if the Five Elements Divine Wheel can block the first thunder tribulation, it will definitely be damaged, but now the Five Elements Divine Wheel can easily block it!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself in a low voice.

Then, the second thunder tribulation, the third thunder tribulation, came one after the other.

And Ye Tian still only used the Five Elements Divine Wheel to resist, and he still blocked it extremely easily.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian survived one thunderstorm after another.

The Ninth Thunder Tribulation has finally arrived.

This time, Ye Tian did not resist, but slashed at the Thunder Tribulation with his backhand.

"Tianyue Knife, slash!"

Boom!!

The terrifying Ninth Thunder Tribulation was directly split by Ye Tian, and the Heavenly Moon Sword Qi slashed into the Thunder Tribulation Cloud, directly annihilating a large area of the Thunder Tribulation Cloud.

At this point, the clouds of thunder dissipated.

Swish!

The Lord of Darkness appeared and congratulated, "Congratulations to Your Highness for surviving the thunder tribulation and ascending to the throne of the Great God!"

"It's just a small god-level, and there are galaxy-level, galaxy-level, great god-level, juggernaut, Tianzun and supreme in the back!"

Ye Tiandao.

"With His Highness's qualifications and talents, it is inevitable that he will become a Supreme in the future. "

The Dark Juggernaut also began to slap his ass.

Prior to this, many high-ranking members of the human race even had a worry in his heart, that is, he thought that if Ye Tian took the path against the sky, he might die under the thunder tribulation one day, because with the improvement of cultivation, every time he survived a thunder tribulation, his power became more and more terrifying.

If you accumulate a little less in a certain realm, you will die once you cross the Thunder Tribulation.

But now, the Dark Lord didn't think that Ye Tian would die under the Thunder Tribulation, Ye Tian, who had survived the Thunder Tribulation so easily, had already far surpassed the realm of His Supreme Highness.

With such strength, he has already evaluated it incomparably.

In short, His Highness Ten Thousand Laws Ye Tian is invincible in the universe at the same level, from ancient times to the present, no one has ever been able to surpass Ye Tian, even if it is the one of the Protoss, he will definitely not be able to achieve such an achievement as Ye Tian.

"Let's go back!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

The Dark Lord accompanied Ye Tian back to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and Ye Tian soon entered a state of retreat again.

This time.

Ye Tian wanted to improve his cultivation and raise his cultivation to the peak of the ninth order of the Great God Level.

With Ye Tianzhi's advanced cultivation talent, coupled with countless resources, it is not difficult to accumulate cultivation.

In a few months, Ye Tian successfully used his time acceleration ability to advance his cultivation to the peak of the ninth order of the Great God Level.

As for the next cultivation task, it is to compress the immortal power, create the Chaos True Technique, the Sword Dao Peerless Technique, and cultivate the Eighteen Golden Body Tricks and the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, etc.

This is destined to be a relatively long period of time, and it will not accumulate for a short time like the god level and the true god level.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the battle tower of the illusory world to test his combat power, and his current combat power has fallen again, but he has maintained his combat power at the Supreme level, which is still very amazing.

Moreover, Ye Tian was shocked to find that his combat power was actually similar to that of the Dark Heavenly Ape in the Chaos Small World, at most it was a little stronger.

In other words, the original Dark Heavenly Ape definitely possessed the combat power of His Highness the Supreme Level.

"Judging from the situation of that chaotic small world, it is absolutely inconspicuous in the chaos, and such an inconspicuous small world can give birth to a supreme-level highness, which shows that the combat power of the supreme-level highness in the chaos is not a rebellion at the same level. I must not be proud, otherwise even if I detach myself in the future, once I enter the chaos, it will be very easy to be hit!"

Ye Tiandao.

Next, Ye Tian reported that he had broken through the Great God-level cultivation and applied to enter the heaven-level area.

After being approved, Ye Tian came to the huge stone gate between the earth-level area and the heaven-level area, that is, the Tianmen Pass.

After passing through the Heavenly Gate Pass, you can enter the Heaven-level area and become a Heaven-level Highness.

Ye Tian's front foot stepped into the Tianmen Pass, and he came out in the next second.

After he entered, he directly killed the tester in an instant, and passed in an instant.

At this point, Ye Tian officially became a highness of a heaven-level region.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's housekeeper Ziya also moved into the heaven-level area, and in the Tianhe region, which is the best in the heaven-level region, he settled in the best heavenly tower in the Tianhe region as his own cultivation tower.

And the fact that Ye Tian had become a Heaven-level Regional Highness also spread out in an instant.

There weren't too many Highnesses in the heaven-level area, because the requirements for entering the heaven-level area were very harsh, and many of them couldn't be promoted to the heaven-level area, so they hit the galaxy level and left the Terran Supreme Palace.

Some returned to their own forces, some chose to become a casual cultivator, or joined other supreme-level forces, and some chose to stay in the Supreme Hall of the Terran race.

At present, there are only 16 Highnesses in the heaven-level region.

this day.

16 His Highnesses came to visit Ye Tian one after another to celebrate Ye Tian's promotion to His Highness the Heavenly Rank.
